arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Sunderland with calls made on Ilia Gruev and Joe Rothwell
arts.sum: Starting XI: Meslier; Bogle, Ampadu, Rodon, Firpo; Tanaka, Gruev; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe. It means Pascal Struijk is named on the bench again and awaits his first league start since New Year's Day. The centre-back played a full 90 minutes against Millwall in the FA Cup earlier this month, having returned from his hamstring injury, but he has not started since.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leeds United vs Sunderland - TV channel, live stream details, highlights - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United are under no illusion about the importance of tonight's match-up as they prepare to welcome AFC Sunderland to Elland Road in the Championship. No one else in the community will be able to see your personal information and you will only receive messages from the Leeds Live sports team.

arts.ttl: Leeds United v Sunderland: Championship – live
arts.sum: Championship updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Latest table | Football Daily | Mail Michael In other Championship news today: This is the first Leeds game since Friday’s statement condemning the anti-Palestine chant aimed at Israel international Manor Solomon. A reminder of that statement: Leeds United again condemn the football chant containing an anti-Palestine lyric aimed at Manor Solomon, having already done so in December. Hate crime and discriminatory language or chanting is not acceptable at Leeds United and the club has a zero-tolerance policy towards discrimination abuse of all kinds. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leeds United to consider summer move for Premier League centre-back?
arts.sum: Leeds United are reportedly considering a move for Leicester City centre-back Conor Coady ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Late Leeds United vs Sunderland referee change made for huge Championship clash
arts.sum: A Preston statement on Saturday read: “Preston North End are aware of a complaint that has been made by Hannibal Mejbri and Burnley FC to today’s match officials with regards to an allegation of a comment made by Milutin Osmajic during today’s Sky Bet Championship fixture at Deepdale. Mejbri later posted on his social media channels that he would “always call out racism”, but North End released a statement which denied Osmajic had used racist language.

arts.ttl: £70m man, England international - Five Premier League strikers Leeds United could sign in summer - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United will have not signed a striker in approaching two years when the summer transfer window opens at the end of this season. LeedsLive understands Southampton turned down an approach from the Whites to sign Cameron Archer on loan last month .

arts.ttl: Leeds United star will cement himself as best in division if he passes £19m test tonight
arts.sum: Jayden Bogle has finally won over the Leeds United fanbase after his start at the club, and he’s been one of the best players in the side this season, facing a big test this evening though against Sunderland . Jayden Bogle up against one of league’s best in Enzo Le Fee tonight

arts.ttl: When Leeds United could seal promotion to the Premier League
arts.sum: It’s not quite at that stage of the season just yet, but should Leeds United see off Sunderland and Sheffield United in their next two games, some supporters may be looking at when they can get the promotion bunting out. If Leeds win every game then, looking at the fixture list, United could reach 91 points away at Luton Town in early April.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United show their nerve and title credentials as Leeds United 'pressure' comment made
arts.sum: Sheffield United held their nerve and found a way to win by giving the type of performance that just may be the difference in the race for the Championship title and promotion, according to boss Chris Wilder. I'd have loved to have played like we did on Wednesday night (against Middlesbrough), which was really controlled against a different type of team.

arts.ttl: Club want to ‘close the deal immediately’ for Sunderland star – Black Cats could be tempted by offer
arts.sum: Chris Rigg has impressed for Sunderland this season. The teenager has played 28 times in the Championship, scoring four times and assisting once and becoming a key part of the side under Regis le Bris.
